name: aurora-skeleton
title: Aurora Skeleton
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Shimmer skeleton loader with Aurora panel-medium base and hover-bg highlight.
docs:
Aurora UI component that installs Aurora Skeleton.

Install `aurora-tokens` and `aurora-components` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/skeleton.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-components`.
